title: Burger Rush Restaurant
description: Welcome to your burger paradise! Dive into the sizzling world of restaurant management where every burger tells a story. Craft mouthwatering creations from a diverse range of ingredients, meeting each customers unique taste buds. Serve fast, combine cleverly, and watch your tiny burger joint grow into the town’s favorite spot for delicious burgers. Your burger mastery starts now!
instructions: Touch Click the ingredients to make a burger and click the customer to serve it
